title: 颜色滤镜
completionRule: Complete only when every legacy control and preset, canonical TOML import/write/reset, the SVG/CSS image pipeline, stable active-image identity, bounded current-node black-and-white sampling, shared configuration surfaces, Card shell lifecycle, responsive parity, accessibility and performance budgets have automated evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: 上色开关、预设与仅黑白条件控件
acceptanceItems: 上色 checkbox 默认关闭
上色开启后才挂载预设 select 与仅黑白 checkbox
预设默认值 redAndBlueGray / 红蓝灰
redAndBlue / 红蓝
redAndBlueGray / 红蓝灰
blueSky / 蓝天
violetAndBrown / 紫棕
violetAndCarnation / 紫粉
paleYellowAndBrown / 淡黄棕
red / 红色
orange / 橙色
yellow / 黄色
green / 绿色
blue / 蓝色
violet / 紫色
预设顺序保持 colorPresets 插入顺序
切换预设清空 customColors
仅黑白图像 checkbox 默认关闭
未知预设回退 redAndBlueGray

sourceUiInventory.title: 基础滤镜滑杆、值标签与默认值
acceptanceItems: 亮度 range 50..150、隐式步长 1、默认 100、百分比值标签
对比度 range 50..150、隐式步长 1、默认 100、百分比值标签
饱和度 range 0..200、隐式步长 1、默认 100、百分比值标签
褐色 range 0..100、隐式步长 1、默认 0、百分比值标签
色相 range 0..360、隐式步长 1、默认 0、角度值标签
oninput 时实时应用当前值
每行标签和值使用 justify-between 紧凑布局
滑杆使用完整 Card 宽度

sourceUiInventory.title: 反色、负片与全部重置
acceptanceItems: 反色 checkbox 默认关闭
负片 checkbox 默认关闭
反色与负片可同时选中
两个 checkbox 位于同一行且间距为 4
RotateCcw 图标按钮位于上色标题行右侧
重置按钮 title 为重置所有滤镜
重置一次恢复所有默认值并同步渲染
重置后的默认预设仍为 redAndBlueGray

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 内容层级、密度与响应式几何
acceptanceItems: 内容使用纵向 space-y-3 text-sm
上色分组使用 space-y-2
滑杆分组使用 space-y-1
预设 select 为全宽、边框、圆角和 text-xs
仅黑白文字使用 muted foreground 与 text-xs
复选框 14px 或 16px 的紧凑尺寸
加载中为空内容的唯一旧状态
加载中文案居中并使用 muted foreground
常见 1920x1080 Reader 侧栏内无横向溢出
窄 Card 通过自然换行和稳定控件宽度保持可操作

sourceUiInventory.title: SVG 上色与 CSS 基础滤镜流水线
acceptanceItems: 上色使用固定语义滤镜 ID neoview-colorize-filter
SVG filter 使用 color-interpolation-filters=sRGB
SVG 使用 feComponentTransfer 与 table 类型 feFuncR/G/B
预设 ColorPoint h/s/m 通过权重展开和亮度保持算法生成 tableValues
自定义颜色至少 2 点时优先于预设
上色 CSS 顺序为 grayscale(100%) 后 url(#filterId)
基础 CSS 顺序为 brightness、saturate、contrast、sepia、hue-rotate、invert、negative
默认值不输出冗余 CSS filter 函数
反色输出 invert(100%)
负片输出 invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg)
反色和负片同时开启时保留旧版顺序与叠加语义
img 与 Canvas 渲染分支使用同一规范化 filter 字符串
禁用上色时移除 SVG 定义且保留基础滤镜

sourceUiInventory.title: 仅黑白检测与迟到结果处理
acceptanceItems: 只有上色与仅黑白同时开启时检测
旧版创建 crossOrigin=anonymous 的第二 Image
旧版使用最多 100x100 Canvas 采样
接近纯黑或纯白的像素不参与饱和度平均
没有中间调像素时判为黑白
平均饱和度小于 5 且最大饱和度小于 10 时判为黑白
Canvas context、读像素或加载失败时判为非黑白
同一 URL 不重复检测
URL 或设置变化时 token 拒绝迟到检测结果
彩色图在 onlyBlackAndWhite 下跳过上色但继续应用基础滤镜

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧 localStorage、规范化配置与复位语义
acceptanceItems: 旧 localStorage key 为 neoview-filter-settings
旧 JSON 读取后以 defaultFilterSettings 补缺字段
旧 JSON 读取失败回退完整默认值
旧实现每次 oninput 立即写 localStorage
旧写入失败只记录错误且界面继续使用内存值
XR 一次性导入旧 key 后写入唯一规范 TOML
目标路径为 [nodes.neoview.image.color_filter]
目标字段使用 snake_case 且严格校验类型、枚举和数值范围
目标配置写入串行、原子、失败回滚且保留未知未来字段
滑杆拖动中只本地预览，结束时至多一次 TOML PATCH
重置删除冗余覆盖或写入完整规范默认值，重启不得复活旧 localStorage
全局设置与未来书籍覆盖具有显式优先级而非双重真相源

sourceUiInventory.title: Registry、懒加载、共享 Card 外壳与独立窗口
acceptanceItems: Card ID 为 colorFilter
标题为颜色滤镜
Palette 图标
默认 control Panel
canHide=true
CardRenderer 动态 import ColorFilterCard
动态 import 使用组件缓存
加载中与加载失败状态
共享 Card 外壳提供显隐、折叠、排序与高度
独立 CardWindow 支持标签切换、复制、排序和关闭
Ctrl+W、Ctrl+Tab、Ctrl+Shift+Tab 与 Ctrl+T 属于独立窗口外壳
Card 不可见或折叠时内容和订阅不挂载

sourceUiInventory.title: XR 明确改进与非回归边界
acceptanceItems: 滤镜更新始终保留当前 img DOM 身份
滤镜更新不改变当前 asset URL
滤镜更新不创建第二条图片请求或解码链
仅黑白检测从当前已解码 img 节点采样而非创建新 Image
仅黑白采样固定上限 64x64
采样结果以当前媒体身份和版本缓存
翻页或 dispose 取消并拒绝迟到采样结果
React 声明式托管 SVG 定义而非 innerHTML 注入 body
不为视觉滤镜生成 sharp 变体、Blob URL 或 Canvas 主渲染副本
滤镜 UI 保持二级 lazy chunk 且不进入 Reader entry 或基础 Sidebar chunk

items.title: 开关上色并条件显示上色设置
items.targetContract: The GUI exposes the legacy colorize checkbox, conditionally mounts preset and black-and-white controls, and applies changes to the active frame immediately without changing its asset identity.
items.notes: Implementation and rendered evidence are intentionally pending.

items.title: 提供 12 个旧版上色预设
items.targetContract: The canonical preset enum preserves all twelve IDs, Chinese labels, order and redAndBlueGray default: redAndBlue/红蓝, redAndBlueGray/红蓝灰, blueSky/蓝天, violetAndBrown/紫棕, violetAndCarnation/紫粉, paleYellowAndBrown/淡黄棕, red/红色, orange/橙色, yellow/黄色, green/绿色, blue/蓝色 and violet/紫色.
items.notes: Unknown imported preset IDs must normalize to redAndBlueGray while unknown TOML sibling fields remain intact.

items.title: 保留自定义颜色点数据契约
items.targetContract: The shared settings schema preserves bounded h/s/m ColorPoint arrays; two or more points override the preset and choosing a preset clears custom points. No custom-color editor is claimed as legacy Card UI.
items.notes: The old store exposes this API even though ColorFilterCard has no editor; the target must not invent a completed editor.

items.title: 仅对黑白图像应用上色
items.targetContract: When colorize and onlyBlackAndWhite are enabled, XR samples at most 64x64 pixels from the already decoded current img node, applies colorize only below the legacy average/max saturation thresholds, and retains every non-colorize filter for color images.
items.notes: Intentional improvement: replace the legacy second Image and 100x100 sample with a 64x64 current-node sample and no second URL/decode.

items.title: 亮度 50..150%
items.targetContract: Brightness is an integer range from 50 through 150 with implicit step 1, default 100 and a live percentage label.
items.notes: GUI and canonical persistence are implemented; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 对比度 50..150%
items.targetContract: Contrast is an integer range from 50 through 150 with implicit step 1, default 100 and a live percentage label.
items.notes: GUI and canonical persistence are implemented; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 饱和度 0..200%
items.targetContract: Saturation is an integer range from 0 through 200 with implicit step 1, default 100 and a live percentage label.
items.notes: GUI and canonical persistence are implemented; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 褐色 0..100%
items.targetContract: Sepia is an integer range from 0 through 100 with implicit step 1, default 0 and a live percentage label.
items.notes: GUI and canonical persistence are implemented; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 色相旋转 0..360°
items.targetContract: Hue rotation is an integer range from 0 through 360 degrees with implicit step 1, default 0 and a live degree label.
items.notes: GUI and canonical persistence are implemented; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 反色与负片可独立或同时启用
items.targetContract: Invert and negative remain independent booleans; CSS preserves legacy ordering, including invert(100%) followed by invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg) when both are enabled.
items.notes: The legacy double-inversion ordering is preserved; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 一次重置全部滤镜
items.targetContract: One named reset command atomically restores every canonical default, updates the active frame without remounting it and persists exactly one reset mutation.
items.notes: One aggregate reset is implemented; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 共享 SVG/CSS 滤镜流水线
items.targetContract: A browser-safe shared domain deterministically generates the legacy sRGB feComponentTransfer tables and ordered CSS filter string for img and Canvas presentation branches without server image variants.
items.notes: Browser-safe declarative SVG and CSS projection are implemented without image transcoding.

items.title: 旧 localStorage 导入与唯一 TOML 真相源
items.targetContract: Import neoview-filter-settings once, validate and normalize it, then persist the only runtime version under [nodes.neoview.image.color_filter] using snake_case fields, serialized atomic PATCH, failure rollback and unknown-field preservation.
items.notes: Canonical fields: colorize_enabled, colorize_preset, custom_colors, only_black_and_white, brightness, contrast, saturation, sepia, hue_rotate, invert and negative.

items.title: 全局默认与书籍覆盖范围明确
items.targetContract: The Card labels the legacy-equivalent TOML value as the global default. Any book-specific override must use the shared book-settings contract with explicit book-over-global precedence and must never create a second localStorage or component-state source of truth.
items.notes: Global TOML precedence is complete; book-specific override remains pending.

items.title: 加载、条件、提交、错误与回滚状态
items.targetContract: The Card covers lazy loading, loaded defaults, colorize-disabled conditional content, active edits, pending persistence, validation failure, write failure with rollback, retry, reset and disposed states without stale visual state.
items.notes: Conditional, rollback, pending-save, stale hydration and explicit retry states are covered by the Card and Store tests.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳与独立窗口行为
items.targetContract: colorFilter retains its 颜色滤镜 title, Palette icon, control Panel default, hideability, independent lazy boundary and shared docked/window Card behaviors.
items.notes: Registry, independent Card chunk and shared Card rendering are covered.

items.title: 旧版控件层级、标签、密度与响应式布局
items.targetContract: The first target render preserves the compact vertical hierarchy, Chinese labels, control ordering, conditional preset section, right-aligned reset icon and value labels, then records any token-level improvement against scripted legacy and current 1920x1080 screenshots.
items.notes: Scripted legacy and target 1920x1080 screenshots characterize the compact hierarchy and 320px Control Panel geometry.

items.title: 命名控件、键盘调节与焦点语义
items.targetContract: Every checkbox, select, range and icon command has an accessible name; native keyboard interaction and visible focus are preserved; ranges expose current/min/max values; conditional controls leave a predictable focus order; CardWindow shortcuts do not steal input editing gestures.
items.notes: All controls use native semantics; reset adds an explicit accessible name over the legacy title-only icon.

items.title: 严格配置 DTO、版本与并发语义
items.targetContract: One revisioned settings DTO validates exact booleans, preset enum, bounded integers and bounded ColorPoint arrays; GUI, CLI and TUI share normalization, compare-and-set/serialized mutation, stale-result rejection, reset and error semantics.
items.notes: Shared codec, HTTP DTO and GUI store are complete; CLI/TUI surfaces remain pending.

items.title: 懒加载、订阅、采样取消与释放
items.targetContract: The Card and SVG definitions load only when needed, subscriptions dispose on collapse/hide/window close, current-node sampling is cancelled or made stale on page/session changes, and all owned DOM/cache state is released without affecting the active reader image.
items.notes: Card visibility and subscription cleanup are covered; current-node stale-sample cancellation and full owned-resource disposal remain pending outside this Card-only change.

items.title: 滤镜操作保持活动媒体身份与解码链
items.targetContract: Changing any filter preserves the exact current img node and asset URL, causes zero duplicate asset requests/decodes, creates no sharp/Blob variant and does not remount the ReaderFrame.
items.notes: Exact img identity and URL are covered; a real asset-route duplicate-request counter remains pending.

items.title: 有界更新、采样、DOM、内存与 chunk 预算
items.targetContract: Pointer movement updates only presentation state, persistence happens at interaction end, black-and-white analysis reads at most 4096 pixels from the current node once per media version, DOM and cache ownership remain O(1), the Card stays independently lazy, and Reader navigation/image latency remains within the established NeoView gates.
items.notes: O(1) store updates, 4096-pixel sampling and 3.5/4.3 KiB deferred chunks are proven; unified navigation timing remains pending.

items.title: 记录存储、采样、安全与交互改进
items.targetContract: Document and verify four intentional changes: localStorage becomes one-time import into canonical TOML; body innerHTML SVG injection becomes React-owned declarative SVG; second-Image 100x100 detection becomes 64x64 current-node sampling; write failures become visible rollback/retry. Legacy filter math, preset IDs, labels, ranges and ordering otherwise remain compatible.
items.notes: The four documented XR replacements are implemented for GUI; CLI/TUI exposure remains pending.
